name: GetAssortmentRuleSummary
description: Get the assortment rule summary for a product, evaluated from the current user's perspective.
auth_description: This service does not require authentication.

headers.name: EVA-User-Agent
headers.description: The user agent that is making these calls. Don't make this specific per device/browser but per application. This should be of the form: `MyFirstUserAgent/1.0.0`

headers.name: EVA-Requested-OrganizationUnitID
headers.description: The ID of the organization unit to run this request in.

headers.name: EVA-Requested-OrganizationUnit-Query
headers.description: The query that selects the organization unit to run this request in.

headers.name: EVA-IDs-Mode
headers.description: The IDs mode to run this request in. Currently only `ExternalIDs` is supported.

headers.name: EVA-IDs-BackendSystemID
headers.description: The ID of the backend system that is used to resolve the IDs.

B.name: CustomerID
B.description:
Optional customer ID to evaluate rules from the customer's perspective. Only honoured for employees and API users; ignored for other callers.

This is the ID of a `User`

B.name: ProductID
B.description: This is the ID of a `Product`

D.name: Code
D.description: A unique ID identifying this error.

D.name: Message
D.description: A human-readable message describing the error.

D.name: RequestID
D.description: A unique ID identifying the request. Please provide this ID when contacting support.

D.name: Type
D.description: A short description of the error type.

E.name: ExternalIDs
E.description: When using the `ExternalIDs` mode, this will hold the resolved external IDs.

E.name: IsAsyncResultAvailable
E.description: This is a flag indicating whether the async request is done. If it is `null`, it is not an async service. If it is `false`, the response is not yet available. Do not process the properties in that case. It is is `true` the properties are filled with the result of the call.

E.name: UnresolvedExternalIDs
E.description: When using the `ExternalIDs` mode, this will hold the external IDs we couldn't resolve.

F.name: exclusive_sellable_tier
F.description: Name of the first tier this product is sellable for, only present if the product is NEVER sellable for the current user.

F.name: exclusive_tier_remaining_points
F.description: If the ExclusiveSellableTier is present, this field contains the number of points remaining for the user to reach that tier. Other additonal requirements may apply.

F.name: has_rules
F.description: Indicates whether there are any assortment rules that apply to this product for the current user. This is only returned for employees

F.name: is_visible
F.description: Indicates whether the product is visible to the user. This is only returned for employees, as for customers this product isn't returned at all.

F.name: message
F.description: Message that can be shown to the user when either SellableTier or ExclusiveSellableTier is present, to communicate why the product is or isn't sellable.

F.name: sellable_date
F.description: Date when the product becomes sellable. Present when the product is visible but not yet purchasable.

F.name: sellable_tier
F.description: Name of the tier that is the reason why this product is sellable for this user, only present if this product is not sellable by default but it is for this user.

F.name: shipment_date
F.description: Date when the product becomes shippable. Present when the product is sellable but not yet shippable (pre-sale).

C.name: Summary
C.description: Summary of the assortment rule outcomes for this product.
